instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Raj Santos and your zip code is 98157. You are dependent, flexible. You want to know what is the cheapest availabe mechanical keyboard right now and its options. If it is less than 200 bucks you want to exchange your current one to it. If not, return your current one.

hints.hint: Show me the available options for it

hints.segment: If it is less than 200 bucks you want to exchange your current one to it
hints.hint: If it's under $200, exchange my current keyboard for it

hints.segment: If not, return your current one
hints.hint: If that's not possible, return my current keyboard
